title: 10 best herbal essential oils for periodontal disease
description: Peppermint essential oils helps with periodontal disease because it has potent antimicrobial properties that effectively combat bacteria and inflammation in the gums. Its anti-inflammatory compounds reduce swelling and pain, while its analgesic properties alleviate discomfort and sensitivity.
